# Process-Based Virtue Epistemology

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** c8d61247-4761-41bf-90e4-ff8927574df1
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Is knowledge achievable without explicit reflection on the virtues?](is-knowledge-achievable-without-explicit-reflection-on-the-virtues-antithesis-bd4291f3-94c2-4ec3-95de-f4c355a61ecb.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is true belief generated by a reliable intellectual process**, **Intellectual virtues are understood as reliable cognitive processes**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief is the output of a reliable intellectual process**, **Knowledge does not necessitate reflective awareness of the intellectual process involved**
